parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM jobs
WHERE status = 'queued'
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED;
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'processing', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' RETURNING *;

UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'generated',
    rendered_video_url = '{{ $json.rendered_video_url }}',
    render_id = '{{ $json.render_id }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING *;
UPDATE jobs SET status = 'uploading', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}' RETURNING *;

UPDATE jobs
SET status = 'uploaded',
    youtube_video_id = '{{ $json.id }}',
    youtube_url = CONCAT('https://youtu.be/', '{{ $json.id }}'),
    completed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $node["상태 → uploading"].json.id }}'
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $node["상태 → uploading"].json.id }}',
  'info',
  'YouTube 업로드 완료',
  NOW()
);

UPDATE jobs
SET retry_count = retry_count + 1,
    status = CASE
      WHEN retry_count + 1 >= 3 THEN 'failed'
      ELSE 'queued'
    END,
    last_error = '{{ $json.error_message }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.job_id }}'
RETURNING id, status, retry_count;

INSERT INTO job_logs (job_id, level, message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.job_id }}',
  'error',
  '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  NOW()
);
